text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Mm. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my day off, I'm walking around town one weekend and run into an
unusually cheerful Eishin Flash.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. I didn't expect to see you here.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Just taking notes on the cake shops I've visited today. They were all
excellent in their own way, so I wanted to write their special traits
down while it was fresh in my mind.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Well, as you know, my family runs a cake shop. Back home, I made a
hobby of going around to different stores and learning about the
craft.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't just about flavor. I'd check interior design, the variety of
cakes offered, location, customer makeup—fifteen criteria in total.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
So yes, I do like cake, but it would be more accurate to say I like cake
shops.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There's still another shop on my itinerary. Well, a cafe, not a cake
shop.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's my main destination for today—the Moon Cafe. It's just around the
corner two streets behind you and through the residential
area—about a fifteen-minute walk.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Might be a good chance to get to know her better. We rarely talk
about anything besides training.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...If you have three hours to spare.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I soon learn what she means by that as a long line snaking towards a
certain shop comes into view...
choice_data_list: Wow, just look at that line.
Wow, just look at that line.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it's a popular cafe, so at around 3:35 on a Saturday there's on
average a forty-five minute line.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...I've factored the wait time into my plans, but is that all right with
you?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Okay, well, let's get in line then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've been in line for ten minutes, and she hasn't spoken a word...
Since we're stuck here, I decide to use the opportunity to make
conversation.
choice_data_list:
So, of the cakes you had today, which did you
like best?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No response—maybe she'd prefer the silence. I consider apologizing
when...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I've decided. My favorite was the Sachertorte—a type of chocolate cake—at the fifth shop I visited.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The chocolate fondant was particularly well done. The texture was a
bit firm, but it split apart just right when I bit into it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Fondant can also be soft, but I prefer it with more of a crunch.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: The tang of the Aprikose—apricot—also rounded out the flavors well.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...And that's why it was the best cake I've eaten today. Is my answer
satisfactory?

text_block_list.name: Cafe Staff
text_block_list.text: We're ready to seat our next customer.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Already? ...Oh, it's been fifty-five minutes. I'd lost track of time.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Shall we?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Let's call someone over in ten minutes. I've already decided what I'm
getting, but you take your time.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Seasonal tarts are what they're known for, so I'll be getting the
seasonal tart and coffee set.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I figure I'll just order the same as her, when an item on the menu
catches my eye.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Could I see?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
"An original cake from our sister store. Not announced anywhere due
to short supply. If you see this, consider yourself lucky!"

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I see. An original... No, I've already decided on the tart for today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She always sticks to her plan, and it seems choosing what to order is
no exception. Well, in that case...

text_block_list.name: Cafe Staff
text_block_list.text: Are we ready to order?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Oh, um...
choice_data_list: One spécialité set and one tart set.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Cafe Staff
text_block_list.text: Very good. I'll be right back with your order.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Staff
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to keep you waiting. One seasonal tart set and our one-day-only
spécialité set.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The spécialité is... a chocolate and caramel two-layer cake. It's
beautifully constructed, almost like an old German castle...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I'm sure it'll melt in your mouth...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Why are you slicing it in two? It'd be more even if you
centered—wait, you mean half for me?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's why you got the spécialité set? But that's your order. I
couldn't—
choice_data_list: We don't have all day. Here.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Ah... Right, well, if you insist.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Mm! It's... rich. Each bite feels so heavy, but not to the point of being
oversweet. It's...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Delicious! It tastes like glücklich... happiness.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
To make it even, you can have half my tart. Hold on, I'll measure the
exact center and—
choice_data_list: Y-you don't have to be so precise.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: No, that won't do. I've got measuring tape, so I can get it perfect.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After enjoying our sweet time together...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: That was delicious.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Even more so than I expected. Next time, I'll have to extend my
allotted time by thirty minutes and order another item.
choice_data_list: Glad you had a good time.
Glad you had a good time.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...And all because of an unplanned event.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I mean how we just happened to meet earlier. Without you, I wouldn't
have gotten as much out of coming here.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's just... I can't bring myself to admit that the best results depend on
pure coincidence. So instead, my best course of action is...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Making plans to do another round of visiting cake shops soon...
Would you like to come along?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'll make a note of it in my schedule.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Well, I think I've managed to get a bit closer to her today.
